twitter_posts.title: R to @AnthropicAI: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are p
twitter_posts.description:
Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are plenty of other ways they can go wrong.

Policy and legal frameworks will need to adapt to keep up.

articles.title: R to @AnthropicAI: To our amazement, another Claude agent modeled its human’s preferences so accurately that—based on only an offhand mention of an interest in skiing—Claude bought him the exact snowb
articles.description: To our amazement, another Claude agent modeled its human’s preferences so accurately that—based on only an offhand mention of an interest in skiing—Claude bought him the exact snowboard he already owned. (Here he is, duplicate snowboard in hand.)
